heading: Injunctions and other orders
label: 689l Injunctions and other orders
notes: References in TextFor definition of “this chapter”, referred to in subsec. (a), see References in Text note set out under .section 661 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Whenever, in the judgment of the Administrator, a New Markets Venture Capital company or any other person has engaged or is about to engage in any acts or practices which constitute or will constitute a violation of any provision of this chapter, or of any rule or regulation under this chapter, or of any order issued under this chapter, the Administrator may make application to the proper district court of the United States or a United States court of any place subject to the jurisdiction of the United States for an order enjoining such acts or practices, or for an order enforcing compliance with such provision, rule, regulation, or order, and such courts shall have jurisdiction of such actions and, upon a showing by the Administrator that such New Markets Venture Capital company or other person has engaged or is about to engage in any such acts or practices, a permanent or temporary injunction, restraining order, or other order, shall be granted without bond.

children.heading: Jurisdiction
children.label: b Jurisdiction
children.text: In any proceeding under subsection (a), the court as a court of equity may, to such extent as it deems necessary, take exclusive jurisdiction of the New Market Venture Capital company and the assets thereof, wherever located, and the court shall have jurisdiction in any such proceeding to appoint a trustee or receiver to hold or administer under the direction of the court the assets so possessed.

children.heading: Administrator as trustee or receiver
children.label: c Administrator as trustee or receiver

children.heading: Authority
children.label: 1 Authority
children.text: The Administrator may act as trustee or receiver of a New Markets Venture Capital company.

children.heading: Appointment
children.label: 2 Appointment
children.text: Upon request of the Administrator, the court may appoint the Administrator to act as a trustee or receiver of a New Markets Venture Capital company unless the court deems such appointment inequitable or otherwise inappropriate by reason of the special circumstances involved.
